projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction Model
projects.summary: Built an XGBoost model predicting churn 90 days in advance, reducing churn by 23%.
projects.content:
### Background
This project aimed to reduce customer churn by identifying high-risk customers using historical product and behaviour data.

### Approach
- Data collection from transactional and event logs.
- Feature engineering: recency, frequency, monetary, product usage metrics, and engagement signals.
- Model: XGBoost with stratified CV and hyperparameter tuning.
- Evaluation: precision/recall at business operating point and uplift analysis.

### Tools
Python, Pandas, XGBoost, scikit-learn, SQL, dbt, Tableau

### Outcome
Model reached 91% accuracy at the chosen threshold and enabled targeted retention campaigns that saved the company approximately $1.2M annually.

projects.title: Executive Sales Intelligence Dashboard
projects.summary: Designed a real-time dashboard tracking 15 KPIs for executive decision making.
projects.content:
### Problem
Executives lacked a single source of truth for regional sales performance which delayed decision making.

### Solution
Built a near-real-time dashboard combining ETL pipelines and a semantic layer to surface 15 executive KPIs. The dashboard included drilldowns by region and SKU, anomaly detection alerts and daily executive summaries.

### Tools
Tableau, PostgreSQL, dbt, Airflow, Looker

### Impact
Enabled faster corrective action; a 23% improvement in response time to regional downturns and clearer prioritization by the C-suite.
